mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To revolutionize English learning through cutting-edge AI technology, interactive experiences, and personalized instruction that makes language acquisition fun, effective, and accessible to everyone.

techInnovations.title: 🚀 Tech Innovations
techInnovations.description: Cutting-edge technology that makes learning English more effective and engaging than ever before.

about.heroDesc: We were founded in 2025 and learning English should be fun, engaging, and accessible to everyone and above all complete.
about.ourStoryDesc: We were founded in 2025 and learning English should be fun, engaging, and accessible to everyone and above all complete.
about.ourMissionDesc1: To revolutionize English learning through cutting-edge AI technology, gamified experiences, and personalized instruction that makes language acquisition fun, effective, and accessible to everyone.
about.ourMissionDesc2: Our platform aims to help learners from many countries improve their English skills and achieve their goals.
about.localImpactDesc: We're committed to making a positive impact in our local community and beyond. Through partnerships with schools, community centers, and non-profit organizations, we provide free English education to underserved populations.
about.meetTeamDesc: Our diverse team of educators, technologists, and innovators is dedicated to transforming English learning.
about.teachingTeamDesc: Native English speakers and certified teachers from around the world
about.teachingTeamItem2: Native speakers from English speaking countries USA
about.techTeamDesc: Innovative developers creating the next generation of learning technology
about.valuesDesc: The principles that guide everything we do at Englishfully.
about.innovateDesc: We constantly push the boundaries of what's possible in language learning through cutting-edge technology.
about.accessibleDesc: Quality English education should be accessible to everyone, regardless of their background or location.
about.completeDesc: We provide a comprehensive English learning experience that covers all aspects of language acquisition.
about.funDesc: Learning should be enjoyable! We make English learning fun through gamification and engaging content.

rdTechnology.heroDesc: Explore our cutting-edge AI technology, research methodology, and innovation roadmap. Learn how we're revolutionizing English learning through advanced technology.
rdTechnology.aiModelsDesc: EnglishFully is built on a modular AI architecture designed for speech, conversation, and adaptive learning for non-native English learners, with a focus on Thai language backgrounds.
rdTechnology.speechDesc: AI models designed for detailed pronunciation assessment and corrective feedback.
rdTechnology.speechItem2: Thai-accent English error detection and phoneme analysis
rdTechnology.speechItem3: Real-time pronunciation feedback for guided practice
rdTechnology.languageDesc: Natural language models supporting conversational practice and content generation.
rdTechnology.languageItem1: Context-aware dialogue generation for AI Chat Simulator
rdTechnology.languageItem2: Grammar and usage analysis for learner responses
rdTechnology.languageItem3: Narrative text generation for story-based learning
rdTechnology.languageItem4: Controlled output tuning for educational accuracy
rdTechnology.languageApplied: Applied in: AI Chat Simulator · AI Lesson Hub
rdTechnology.personalizationDesc: Machine learning systems that adapt learning paths to individual users.
rdTechnology.personalizationItem1: Learner profiling based on performance and behavior
rdTechnology.personalizationItem4: Continuous optimization based on learning outcomes
rdTechnology.analyticsDesc: Data systems that monitor progress and inform learning decisions.
rdTechnology.analyticsItem1: Speaking, listening, and interaction progress tracking
rdTechnology.methodologyDesc: Our research-driven approach combines pedagogical best practices with cutting-edge technology to create effective learning solutions.
rdTechnology.pedagogicalDesc: Evidence-based teaching methods integrated into our platform
rdTechnology.dataDrivenDesc: Continuous improvement through user data analysis
rdTechnology.roadmapDesc: Applied R&D roadmap for AI-powered English learning, focused on Thai learners

rdTechnology.q1Item3: Thai-accent English detection and error classification
rdTechnology.q2Title: 2025 Q2 – Smart Lesson & AI Video Generation
rdTechnology.q2Desc: Automation of lesson creation using learner performance data and CEFR alignment.
rdTechnology.q2Item1: AI Lesson Hub with adaptive lesson sequencing
rdTechnology.q2Item3: Quality control framework for AI-generated learning content
rdTechnology.q2Supports: Supports: AI Lesson Hub · AI Video Learning
rdTechnology.q3Desc: Expansion into contextual, scenario-based language learning environments.
rdTechnology.q3Item1: AI Chat Simulator for real-world conversation practice
rdTechnology.q3Item2: Branching story logic for interactive learning
rdTechnology.q3Item3: Adaptive difficulty based on learner interaction patterns
rdTechnology.q4Desc: Integration of all learning data into a unified personalization engine.
rdTechnology.q4Item3: Personalized content recommendations across voice, chat, story, and video
rdTechnology.realtimeDesc: Designed for uninterrupted learning flow and immediate correction.
rdTechnology.realtimeItem2: Conversational pacing suitable for live practice
rdTechnology.languageAwareDesc: Instruction designed around the learner's native language background.
rdTechnology.languageAwareItem1: Thai–English pronunciation and grammar interference awareness

rdTechnology.privacyItem3: Alignment with international data protection principles

contact.heroDesc: Get in touch with our team for support, inquiries, or feedback. We're here to help you succeed!
contact.getInTouchDesc: Multiple ways to reach us. Choose the method that works best for you!
contact.sendMessageDesc: Have a question, suggestion, or feedback? We'd love to hear from you!
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you...
contact.teacherPlaceholder: Your teaching background, qualifications, and why you want to join us...
contact.faqDesc: Quick answers to common questions. Can't find what you're looking for? Contact us!
contact.faq1Answer: Simply sign up for a free account, take our placement test, and start with our beginner courses. Our AI will create a personalized learning path for you!
contact.faq2Answer: We offer a free plan with basic features, premium plans starting at $19.99/month, and pro plans with personal tutoring for $49.99/month.
contact.faq3Question: 📱 Do you have a mobile app?
contact.faq3Answer: Yes! Our mobile app is available for both iOS and Android. Download it from the App Store or Google Play Store.
contact.faq4Answer: Yes! We provide certificates of completion for all our courses and specialized modules. Premium users also get detailed progress reports.
contact.faq5Question: 🤖 How does the AI technology work?
contact.faq5Answer: Our AI analyzes your learning patterns, pronunciation, and progress to provide personalized feedback and adapt lessons to your needs.
contact.faq6Question: 👥 Can I practice with other learners?
contact.faq6Answer: Absolutely! Join our community forum, participate in study groups, and practice with language exchange partners from around the world.
contact.messageSuccess: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.messageFailed: Failed to send message. Please try again.
contact.applicationSuccess: Application submitted successfully! We'll review your application and get back to you soon.
contact.applicationFailed: Failed to submit application. Please try again.

aiVoiceCoach.heroDesc: Practice real conversations and master English with our advanced AI-powered voice recognition system. Get instant feedback on your speech, pronunciation, accent, and build confidence in real-time.
aiVoiceCoach.featuresDesc: Our AI Language Tutor uses cutting-edge speech recognition technology to provide personalized pronunciation feedback.
aiVoiceCoach.realtimeDesc: Get instant corrections as you speak
aiVoiceCoach.accentDesc: Improve clarity, fluency, and natural delivery
aiVoiceCoach.howItWorksDesc: Our AI creates dynamic, context-aware conversations that adapt to you in real time, analyzing your speech to deliver precise, personalized feedback.
aiVoiceCoach.step1Desc: Start a conversation that matches your learning goals
aiVoiceCoach.step2Desc: Begin speaking with the AI in a natural dialogue
aiVoiceCoach.technologyDesc: Powered by state-of-the-art speech recognition and natural language processing models.
aiVoiceCoach.mlModelsDesc: Our AI uses deep neural networks trained on millions of hours of native English speech to accurately assess pronunciation, intonation, and fluency.
aiVoiceCoach.accuracyDesc: Our system achieves industry-leading accuracy rates in pronunciation assessment and feedback generation.

aiConversationSimulator.heroDesc: Practice real-world conversations with our AI-powered simulator. Engage in natural dialogues across various scenarios, from business meetings to casual chats.
aiConversationSimulator.featuresDesc: Our AI Language Tutor uses cutting-edge speech recognition technology to provide personalized, realistic, context-aware dialogues that adapt to your skill level and learning goals.
aiConversationSimulator.businessDesc: Practice English based on topics and situations you choose.
aiConversationSimulator.academicDesc: Excel in academic and educational settings
aiConversationSimulator.howItWorksDesc: Our AI creates dynamic, context-aware conversations that respond naturally to your input and adapt to your learning needs.

aiConversationSimulator.nluDesc: Our AI understands context, intent, and nuance in conversations, creating realistic and engaging dialogue experiences.
aiConversationSimulator.analysisDesc: Get instant feedback on your grammar, vocabulary, pronunciation, and conversation flow.
aiConversationSimulator.analysisItem2: Pronunciation and accent analysis and training
